Curated by the artist Paxslim, the series highlights artists, communities and sonic histories rooted in African and Afro-diasporic identity.\nEach episode focuses on a different scene, bringing together music, research and storytelling to spotlight emerging and influential voices shaping contemporary underground culture.\n\nPaxslims Africa Only Radio Episode 4 explores the Kenyan underground scene.\nFeaturing selections from artist and DJ Lilmaina, model, creative and stylist Asha, storyteller and Escape Plan founder Amari Moto, and creative director, designer and stylist Rosemary. \nMixed by Haram, Paxslim's longtime producer."}]]}]]}]}],["$","article","iTZu0TW9Ies",{"className":"group rounded-2xl overflow-hidden bg-neutral-900 border border-neutral-800 hover:border-neutral-600 transition","children":["$","a",null,{"href":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iTZu0TW9Ies","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener noreferrer","className":"block","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"aspect-video overflow-hidden","children":["$","img",null,{"src":"https://i2.ytimg.com/vi/iTZu0TW9Ies/hqdefault.jpg","alt":"AO x NTS Radio - Ep 3: Tanzanian Underground","className":"w-full h-full object-cover group-hover:scale-105 transition duration-300"}]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"p-5","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-neutral-500 mb-2","children":"24. Curated by the artist Paxslim, the series highlights artists, communities and sonic histories rooted in African and Afro-diasporic identity.\nEach episode focuses on a different scene, bringing together music, research and storytelling to spotlight emerging and influential voices shaping contemporary underground culture.\n\nPaxslims Africa Only Radio Episode 3 explores the Tanzanian underground scene. Featuring Sekera, a director, musician and model, Ivana, a writer and creative director, Cloud B, a music producer and farmer, and BM, who each share tracks highlighting emerging artists and sounds shaping the scene."}]]}]]}]}]]}],["$","footer",null,{"className":"mt-16 text-center text-sm text-neutral-600","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Quelle: YouTube RSS Feed für"," ",["$","span",null,{"className":"font-mono","children":"@africaonlytv"}]]}]}]]}]}]
